summary: Phase 3.2 E2E testing completed successfully. Backend and frontend fully support image_urls and features for availability listings. All new fields work correctly in both creation and display flows while maintaining anonymity. Existing core flows (auth, requests, matches) unaffected.
passed_tests: Backend: Create listing with image_urls and features via POST /api/listings (3 images, 5 features)
Backend: Create listing without image_urls/features (robustness - defaults to empty arrays)
Backend: GET /api/listings returns image_urls and features in anonymous feed
Backend: GET /api/listings?mine=true returns image_urls and features
Backend: All 28 existing tests still pass (100% success rate)
Frontend: Image URLs textarea field exists with placeholder 'https://...1.jpg, https://...2.jpg'
Frontend: Features textarea field exists with placeholder 'Şömine, Göl manzarası, Jakuzili'
Frontend: Listing creation with comma-separated images and features works correctly
Frontend: 'Aktif Kapasitelerim' displays first image as thumbnail
Frontend: 'Aktif Kapasitelerim' displays up to 4 feature badges (correctly limits from 5+ features)
Frontend: Anonymous listings feed displays first image for listings with image_urls
Frontend: Anonymous listings feed displays up to 4 feature badges
Frontend: Anonymity maintained - no hotel name, address, phone, WhatsApp, website, or contact person visible in feed
Frontend: Listings without images/features render gracefully without broken UI
Frontend: Request creation from /listings still works (regression test)
Frontend: Locking mechanism still works (regression test)
Frontend: Requests page loads correctly (regression test)
